page: Google Cloud Platform m4n-hypermem-32 is a memory-optimized server instance belonging to the m4n server family. It features an x86_64 CPU architecture with 32 dedicated virtual CPUs and a total memory capacity of 496.0 GB. This configuration yields a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 15.5 GB of RAM per core, positioning the instance for workloads requiring substantial memory footprints relative to compute resources.

The instance does not include integrated local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached storage options. Additionally, the m4n-hypermem-32 does not feature any graphics processing units and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. These hardware constraints represent a design tradeoff, prioritizing high-density system memory over local storage performance and hardware-accelerated parallel processing.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the m4n-hypermem-32 offers high resource density specifically tailored for memory-bound applications. By allocating 496.0 GB of RAM to 32 dedicated vCPUs, it allows organizations to run large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-intensive data analytics workloads without paying for excess compute cores.
description: Google Cloud Platform m4n-hypermem-32 is a memory-optimized server instance designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 32 dedicated vCPUs and 496.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 15.5 GB per vCPU. The instance does not include local storage or GPUs, requiring network-attached storage for data persistence and relying entirely on CPU-based processing. This hardware profile makes the m4n-hypermem-32 highly cost-efficient for workloads that demand massive memory capacity without the need for proportional scaling of compute cores. It is particularly suited for hosting large in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and complex data analytics pipelines that operate entirely within system memory.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform m4n-hypermem-32 is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 496.0 GB of RAM, designed for memory-intensive workloads without local storage.
